candidates.why: Classic SG&A overhead component; populated for recent years.

Potential overhead bucket; appears multiple times and may support earlier years, but label is generic and could overlap with other components.

Balance sheet accrual, not income statement SG&A expense.

Added R&D because it is separately reported above EBIT and does not appear embedded in the selected SG&A labels. Excluded depreciation/amortization and totals/subtotals.

variables.notes: Used granular recurring finance-cost components and avoided net/total finance rows to reduce overlap. Excluded FX and gains/losses.

candidates.why: Income statement allocation of earnings, not balance sheet equity.

final_choice.row_label: EQUITY Total equity attributable to the shareholders of the parent company
